side_effects.description: MDMA effects slightly reduced, extended recovery period (1 week to return to normal sleep) vs normal 1-2 days. Experienced brain zaps in evening during recovery.

protocol_notes: User on Retatrutide, took ~200mg MDMA once or twice yearly. Stopped drinking completely before Retatrutide. Unusual circumstance: does not go out or stay late regularly, so MDMA dose was unusual for body.
